subcodes.first_line: O son of him who was martyred in the path of God! Thy graceful and eloquent letter was read, bringing joy to all hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن من استشهد فی سبیل الله رقیمه لطیفه بلیغه قرائت گردید سبب گشایش دلها
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @excellence; distinction, @work as worship
